title: MathSticks solver output
description: JSON document emitted to stdout by `mathstick.py --problem ...`.

problem.description: The input puzzle as a string: `a op b = c` where a, b, c are positive-digit integers and op is '+' or '-'. Whitespace around the tokens is optional.

max_k.description: Maximum stick-move budget the solver was invoked with (defaults to 2 in the CLI; any positive integer is accepted).

counts.description: Solution counts keyed by stringified move-count k. Keys are the string forms of integers 1..max_k; values are the lengths of the corresponding arrays in `solutions`.

nodes_visited.description: Total DFS nodes visited across both target-operator passes of the forward solver on this problem. Cumulative; sums every recursive entry, including leaves.

nodes_pruned.description: Total DFS branches rejected during this problem's search. A branch is rejected by either the running stick-budget cap or the suffix-feasibility check; both reasons are counted into the same total.

solutions.description: Solutions grouped by stringified move-count k. Keys cover 1..max_k; each value is an array of solution objects whose length matches `counts[k]`.

solution.description: A single solution to the puzzle: a target equation reachable from `problem` by exactly k stick relocations, where k is the key under which this object appears in `solutions`.

equation.description: The target (valid) equation, space-separated, in the form `a op b = c` with op ∈ {+, -}.

picks.description: Sorted list of stick labels removed from the problem state to reach the target. Length equals the move count k.

places.description: Sorted list of stick labels added to the problem state to reach the target. Length equals the move count k and always matches `picks` in length (conservation).

moves.description: Explicit move list, k entries, each of the form `Move(<src>, <dst>)`. The pairing of picks→places is a deterministic sort-and-zip and the intermediate state between move 1 and move 2 is not guaranteed to render valid digits in every slot.

nodes_visited.description: Cumulative `nodes_visited` counter at the moment the DFS reached this solution's leaf. Monotonically increasing in discovery order across the two target-operator passes; bounded above by the top-level `nodes_visited`.

nodes_pruned.description: Cumulative `nodes_pruned` counter at the moment the DFS reached this solution's leaf. Same conventions as the per-solution `nodes_visited`.

stick_label.description: A position label for one matchstick. Either `<slot-letter><segment-index>` where the slot letter is a single uppercase letter assigned A, B, C, ... left-to-right across the equation's digit slots and the segment index is 0..6 (0 = middle, 1 = top, 2 = top-right, 3 = bottom-right, 4 = bottom, 5 = bottom-left, 6 = top-left); or the literal `G0`, the operator's editable vertical stroke (present only when the operator is `+`).
